name: Content Calendar
description: Visual weekly/monthly calendar to plan and schedule social media posts across platforms.

name: Campaign Planner
description: Step-by-step wizard to build a full marketing campaign brief from goal to tactics.

name: Social Post Generator
description: Generate platform-specific social media posts with tone control and hashtag suggestions.

name: Hashtag Research Tool
description: Find and categorize hashtags by reach and relevance with platform-specific limits.

name: Headline A/B Tester
description: Score and compare headlines on emotion, power words, clarity, and predicted CTR.

name: Email Subject Line Generator
description: Generate and score email subject lines in multiple styles with open-rate prediction.

name: SEO Meta Tag Generator
description: Generate title tags, meta descriptions, OG tags, and Twitter cards with live previews.

name: Keyword Planner
description: Generate related keywords categorized by intent with content type suggestions.
